input: qwen3.5:9b returns empty content under 3+ concurrent Ollama requests. Switched to gemma3n:e4b.
ollama-rs parse_host_port() drops URL path component — OLLAMA_HOST with a base path like /v1 silently loses it.
Decision: genai-llm feature disabled by default in v0.32; ollama-rs-llm is new default. Genai preserved behind feature flag for multi-provider scenarios.
ollama-rs num_predict uses u32-to-i32 cast that silently wraps for values above i32::MAX. Fix: clamp with .min(i32::MAX as u32) before cast.
Always verify feature-gated code compilation using cargo build and cargo clippy instead of trusting rust-analyzer diagnostics.

When gating Rust modules behind feature flags with #[cfg(feature = "...")], rust-analyzer shows 'unlinked-file' and 'inactive-code' warnings for the gated modules. These warnings are IDE noise, not real errors.
pydantic-settings Settings() reads .env during tests — pass _env_file=None to isolate
ollama-rs limitation: no streaming option for chat with history (GitHub Issue #41 pepperoni21/ollama-rs). MemCan uses non-streaming chat() as workaround.
Ollama CVEs (CVE-2024-37032 Probllama RCE, CVE-2025-51471 Cross-Domain Token Exposure) assessed — not applicable to MemCan because only chat/show APIs are used, no model pulling occurs.
Server auth uses constant-time comparison (subtle crate) to prevent timing side-channel attacks on Bearer token verification.
Do not use symlinks in Docker build contexts — Docker resolves them differently.
Bcrypt dummy hash was 61 chars instead of the standard 60.
When verifying bug fixes, always test with fresh data — cached results may predate the fix.
ollama-rs API: FormatType::Json for structured JSON output, ThinkType::False to disable chain-of-thought — both supported natively without workarounds.
